hero.title: Microsoft Fabric Analytics Engineer
hero.description: Master end-to-end data engineering and analytics on Microsoft Fabric. Build production-ready pipelines, semantic models, and governance-ready lakehouses used by enterprise teams.

nextStepCta.title: Your next role starts with your next step.
